title: AppArmor Profiles
description:
## AppArmor Profiles

AppArmor is a Linux kernel security module that restricts programs' capabilities. In Kubernetes 1.30+, it is supported natively in the securityContext.

**Your task:**

Create a Pod named `apparmor-pod` using the `nginx:alpine` image. Configure its Pod-level `securityContext` to use the `RuntimeDefault` AppArmor profile.

```bash
# Verify the profile is set:
kubectl get pod apparmor-pod -o yaml | grep appArmor
```

hints.title: Set AppArmor Profile
hints.command:
cat <<EOF | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: apparmor-pod
spec:
  securityContext:
    appArmorProfile:
      type: RuntimeDefault
  containers:
  - name: app
    image: nginx:alpine
EOF
